nodes.label: AI as document review and compliance checker
nodes.grounding_span: I frequently query this custom GPT to confirm the content of said documents align with our internal and industry standards

nodes.label: AI as task automation tool for repetitive tasks
nodes.grounding_span: I have attempted to automate some easy and repetitive tasks, like document summarization to GPT

nodes.label: AI reliability and accuracy
nodes.grounding_span: it consistently cannot export it on the template as a word doc with correct formatting

nodes.label: AI in high-stakes engineering tasks
nodes.grounding_span: the stakes are too high if a mistake is made so I would always want to complete the review myself

nodes.label: AI as iterative collaborator
nodes.grounding_span: It's usually a conversation where I ask it for a deliverable and then I review and request revisions

nodes.label: AI for mental load reduction
nodes.grounding_span: handling my mental load as a working mom

nodes.label: AI for team bonding and creativity
nodes.grounding_span: We used AI to make a team GPT and then had it brainstorm its own name for us and make a graphic of itself

nodes.label: Professional competence and accuracy
nodes.grounding_span: Making just one mistake or missing a regulation or permit could kill a multi-million dollar project

nodes.label: Productivity and time savings
nodes.grounding_span: it doesn't save me any time to have AI complete it

nodes.label: Cognitive autonomy and skill preservation
nodes.grounding_span: I have always been very intentional about using my brain

nodes.label: Team cohesion and workplace culture
nodes.grounding_span: It helped us to bond as a team

nodes.label: Frustration with AI formatting failures
nodes.grounding_span: AI just could not get the formatting right

nodes.label: Caution due to hallucination risk
nodes.grounding_span: the AI had hallucinated, and I had to share that with my boss

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI for compliance checking
nodes.grounding_span: I frequently query this custom GPT to confirm the content

nodes.label: Optimism about AI for mental load
nodes.grounding_span: Where AI is most exciting to me... is in handling my mental load

nodes.label: Positive view of AI for team bonding
nodes.grounding_span: It helped us to bond as a team

nodes.label: Iterative verification and revision approach
nodes.grounding_span: I review and request revisions on that deliverable

nodes.label: Intentional cognitive effort and skill preservation
nodes.grounding_span: I have always been very intentional about using my brain
